sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91028" key="prwto/polis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρωτό-πολις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n91028.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">first in the city</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Τύχη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.322c</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
